title: erodium ruthenicum
intro: Erodium ruthenicum, also known as the pink-stemmed geranium, is a perennial plant belonging to the geranium family. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, with its roots and leaves possessing anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Erodium ruthenicum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and ease respiratory problems, making it a valuable herbal remedy. The plant can be prepared in various forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
